narratives.Overview: Make Relaxanator installable and fully functional offline: web app manifest, service worker precaching the app shell and audio samples.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Web app manifest with icons; app is installable (Add to Home Screen / Dock). FR-2: Service worker precaches the app shell and audio sample assets. NFR-1: After first load, all features work with no network. NFR-2: Passes Lighthouse PWA installability checks.
narratives.LockedDecisions: Refinement 2026-07-13 (#5 Evaluate lock): (1) AC locked as FR-1–2 + NFR-1–2 as written in Requirements — no MVP carve-outs. (2) FR-2 sample precache: all shipped sample files under public/ (and any sample paths the app already loads from that tree). (3) Install UX for MVP: manifest + service worker only; rely on browser-native install / Add to Home Screen / Dock — no custom in-app Install affordance or beforeinstallprompt UI in this scope.

items.title: Service worker precaching (app shell + all public/ samples)
